description_long: This is a wall-mounted metallic hanger, typically used for holding items such as towels or rolls in urban environments like public restrooms, garages, or utility rooms. The design features a circular mounting base with a decorative cap, from which a single, bent rod extends outward and downward, forming an open-ended loop. The rod is angular, with a clean, geometric bend, and the open end allows for easy placement and removal of hanging items. The finish is a dark, oil-rubbed bronze or similar metallic coating, giving it a sleek and modern appearance. The construction appears sturdy, with all visible parts made of metal, and the mounting base is designed to be affixed securely to a vertical surface.
description: A wall-mounted, oil-rubbed bronze metal hanger with a circular base and an open-ended angular rod for holding items. Its sleek, modern design is both functional and decorative.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular mounting base and the full angular rod extending outward and downward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the mounting base and the straight extension of the rod away from the wall.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the circular base and the angular, open-ended rod shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the rod's profile and the mounting base's thickness.
